Hints.ClickOrDragHotbarMacro: Click to use; drag to the hotbar to create a macro

Stop.Label: Environment
Stop.DefaultText: Environment action. Pay attention to the scene.

Settings.MenuHint: Configure the text and style of your requests.
Settings.Intro: Configure the text of your requests. Click an image to submit a request, or drag it to the hotbar.
Settings.ImageTitle: Submit a request or drag it to the hotbar
Settings.StyleNote: Only safe text styling properties are saved in CSS style: color, background, font, alignment, spacing, padding, and border.

Chat.Forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
Chat.WhisperRequired: The Game Master has disabled private messages. Ask the Game Master to cancel the request.

Hotbar.Added: The "{label}" macro has been added to the hotbar.
Hotbar.AddError: Could not add the request to the hotbar.

Active.Heading: Active Requests
Active.Empty: There are no active requests yet.
Active.ClearConfirm: Cancel all active requests and delete their linked chat messages?
Active.MissingContent: This request message is no longer in chat. Remove the row from the active requests window?
Active.MessageNotRendered: The message exists in the chat log, but is not currently rendered. Open the chat log and try again.

Playing.Label: Playing
Playing.Description: Fully immersed in the game context and available for requests.

Listening.Label: Listening
Listening.Description: Hearing and/or seeing the game, but not ready to act actively right now.

Away.Label: Away
Away.Description: Temporarily distracted or away from the computer; not following the game, but should return soon or can be called for urgent matters.

Unavailable.Label: Unavailable
Unavailable.Description: Away and not following the game; do not wait, continue without this player.

Status.ChatDetails: Player {player} changes status from {oldStatus} to {newStatus}. Meaning: {description}

Audit.Heading: Focus Audit
Audit.ResetAllConfirm: Reset audit data for all players?

Columns.FoundryStatusHint: Foundry player status: green if online, red if offline.

LastRequest.Title: Last request
LastRequest.Description: Time when the player last submitted a request through the module

ActiveRequest.Title: Active request
ActiveRequest.Description: Time elapsed since the first current active request that has not been granted or cancelled

LastChat.Title: Chat messages
LastChat.Description: Time when a chat message was last published on behalf of the player, regardless of cause or content

LastGranted.Title: Floor granted
LastGranted.Description: Time elapsed since the player was last granted the floor through module requests or manually from the audit window

Settings.SaveError: Could not save focus audit settings.
Settings.ValidationError: Enter non-negative values where each stricter level is not lower than the previous one.

Readiness.Heading: Readiness Check
Readiness.ClearFirst: Clear the current readiness check before starting another one.

Message.Title: Readiness Check
Message.Text: Game Master {gm} asks you to confirm readiness to continue the game

Technical.ResponseDetails: Player {player} answered the readiness request from {timestamp}. Status: {status}.
Technical.NoAnswerDetails: Player {player} did not answer the readiness request from {timestamp}.

Break.Heading: Announce a break
Break.Description: Approximate break period rounded up to 5 minutes.

Stopwatch.Title: Stopwatch
Stopwatch.NotStarted: Start the stopwatch before recording events.
Stopwatch.MacroAdded: Stopwatch event macro has been added to the hotbar.
Stopwatch.MacroError: Could not add the stopwatch event macro to the hotbar.

Manager.Name: Name
Manager.NoSoundSelected: The "No sound" signal is selected: the timer will expire without a sound signal.

DeleteExpired.Title: Delete expired timers
DeleteExpired.None: There are no expired timers to delete.

Errors.Forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
Errors.SoundPreviewFailed: Could not play the selected signal.
